_publications._publicationTitle: Overcoming BET Inhibitor Resistance in Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumors.

_contextSnippet: We observed massive cell death (70–80% apoptosis) in as few as 3 days when doxycycline-induced Brd4 knockdown was combined with JQ1
details: Massive cell death (70-80% apoptosis) occurred in 3 days when doxycycline-induced Brd4 knockdown was combined with JQ1
